SEARCH
Package ru.tehkode.permissions

Interface PEXBackendConfiguration

public interface PEXBackendConfiguration
Mutable configuration node used when constructing permission backends (classic Bukkit configuration shape).

Backends receive an instance of this interface at construction time. It mirrors a subset of Bukkit's ConfigurationSection API so backend plugins can read connection settings, table names, and other storage parameters without depending on a concrete config implementation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PEXBackendConfiguration
    createSection(String path)
    Creates (or returns) a nested configuration section at the given path.
    PEXBackendConfiguration
    getConfigurationSection(String path)
    Returns the nested configuration section at the given path.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of this configuration section.
    String
    getString(String path)
    Returns the string value at the given path.
    String
    getString(String path, String def)
    Returns the string value at the given path, or a default when unset.
    List<String>
    getStringList(String path)
    Returns the string list at the given path.
    Map<String,Object>
    getValues(boolean deep)
    Returns all key-value pairs in this section.
    boolean
    isConfigurationSection(String path)
    Returns whether the value at the given path is a configuration section.
    void
    set(String path, Object value)
    Sets a value at the given configuration path.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the name of this configuration section.
      Returns:
      section name; never null

    • getString

      String getString(String path)
      Returns the string value at the given path.
      Parameters:
      path - configuration path
      Returns:
      string value, or null if the path is not set

    • getString

      String getString(String path, String def)
      Returns the string value at the given path, or a default when unset.
      Parameters:
      path - configuration path
      def - value to return when the path is not set
      Returns:
      string value at path, or def

    • set

      void set(String path, Object value)
      Sets a value at the given configuration path.
      Parameters:
      path - configuration path
      value - value to store; may be a scalar, list, or nested section

    • getStringList

      List<String> getStringList(String path)
      Returns the string list at the given path.
      Parameters:
      path - configuration path
      Returns:
      list of strings; never null (empty list if unset)

    • getConfigurationSection

      PEXBackendConfiguration getConfigurationSection(String path)
      Returns the nested configuration section at the given path.
      Parameters:
      path - configuration path
      Returns:
      nested section, or null if the path is not a section

    • createSection

      PEXBackendConfiguration createSection(String path)
      Creates (or returns) a nested configuration section at the given path.
      Parameters:
      path - configuration path for the new section
      Returns:
      the created or existing section; never null

    • isConfigurationSection

      boolean isConfigurationSection(String path)
      Returns whether the value at the given path is a configuration section.
      Parameters:
      path - configuration path
      Returns:
      true if path points to a nested section

    • getValues

      Map<String,Object> getValues(boolean deep)
      Returns all key-value pairs in this section.
      Parameters:
      deep - true to include values from nested sections recursively
      Returns:
      map of path keys to values; never null
